title: IDF Kills Senior Hamas Operative Behind Deadliest Single Attack on Israeli Troops
detail: The IDF announced it killed a senior Hamas operative identified as the mastermind behind the deadliest single attack on Israeli troops during the Gaza war, in a targeted strike. The operative was responsible for planning and executing an assault that caused more Israeli military casualties in a single incident than any other engagement of the conflict.

title: Israeli Strike Kills 3 Palestinians as Indirect Ceasefire Talks Resume
detail: At least 3 Palestinians were killed in an Israeli strike on Gaza as indirect ceasefire mediation efforts resumed. Despite continued Israeli military operations, the mediation track — involving Qatar, Egypt, and the US — returned to active negotiations, with mediators working to bridge remaining gaps between Israel and Hamas on a potential deal.
